texto: My entire life, I've been fascinated with stories. To everyone else, it seemed like the story itself was enough. But I wanted to know why someone told the story in the first place. Had something happened? Or were they only wishing for something to happen?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amber Lough: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “My entire life, I've been fascinated with stories. To everyone else, it seemed like the story its…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, stories, story pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
